query:
-- Check remaining duplicate items (32384-32386 from INV-47584 that were also duplicated)
-- These were linked to S1131 which is the 4G Internet service
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId, invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161' AND id >= 32000
ORDER BY id;

-- Also check the original items they duplicate
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId, invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161' AND id < 32000
ORDER BY lineAmount DESC;

SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId, invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161' AND id >= 32000
ORDER BY id;

-- Also check the original items they duplicate
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId, invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161' AND id < 32000
ORDER BY lineAmount DESC;
